headline: Computer History
description: Computing history: Ada Lovelace (first algorithm, 1843) → Turing (theoretical foundation, 1936) → ENIAC (first electronic general-purpose computer, 1945) → transistors (1947) → integrated circuits (1958) → microprocessors (Intel 4004, 1971) → personal computers (Altair 1975, Apple II 1977, IBM PC 1981) → Internet → smartphones.

citation.name: The Innovators: How a Group of Hackers, Geniuses, and Geeks Created the Digital Revolution (2025)
citation.author: Isaacson W.

citation.name: The Computer: A Very Short Introduction (2025)
citation.author: multiple
